productDisplayName: Scullers Men Blue & Navy Blue Striped T-shirt
description: Style Notescullers is a celebration of life at its fullest, most unusual and least expected. Scullers is for those who take life on with self-assurance and soul. A navy blue and light blue horizontally striped polo tee by Scullers with a navy blue collar, to give you a modern, contemporary vibe.Product DescriptionLight blue T-shirt with white and navy blue stripes, navy blue spread collar with a two button placket, vented hem, short ribbed sleeves and a Scullers logo on the left chestMaterial and Care100% CottonDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or low dry in shadeLow iron inside outSizeRelaxed FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
